note: quarterly estimated tax with suggested amount

message.subject: Q2 estimated tax due soon
message.body_text: Your estimated quarterly federal tax payment for Q2 2026 is due by June 15, 2026. Based on your prior filings, the suggested payment is $1,420. Pay through EFTPS or by mail.

note: extension deadline, filed does not match any lexicon verb

message.subject: Extension approved
message.body_text: Your state filing extension was approved. Your extended return must be filed by October 15, 2026. Interest continues to accrue on any unpaid balance from the original due date.

note: vehicle registration: expiration date, fee plus service fee

message.subject: Registration renewal notice
message.body_text: Vehicle registration for plate 7XKW412 expires on 07/31/2026. Renew online for $214.00 plus a $3.50 service fee. Smog certification is required before renewal.

note: parking ticket: fine, escalation amount, deadline; contest outside lexicon

message.subject: Notice of parking violation
message.body_text: Notice of parking violation #PV-2026-09183. Fine amount: $65.00. Pay or contest this citation by 07/06/2026. Unpaid fines increase to $130 after the due date.

note: jury summons: service start date, relative response window, potential fine

message.subject: Summons for jury service
message.body_text: You are summoned for jury service beginning August 10, 2026. Respond to this summons within 10 days of receipt. Failure to respond may result in a fine of up to $1,500.

note: in-category negative: refund approved, no obligation

message.subject: Your refund was approved
message.body_text: Your federal refund of $830.00 was approved and will be deposited within 21 days. No action is needed. Track your refund status online.

note: unpaid balance notice: amount, deadline; apply outside lexicon

message.subject: Notice of unpaid balance
message.body_text: You have an unpaid balance of $2,316.44 for tax year 2025. To avoid additional penalties and interest, pay by July 22, 2026. If you cannot pay in full, you may apply for a payment plan.

note: voter registration: election date and registration deadline; check outside lexicon

message.subject: Voter registration deadline
message.body_text: To vote in the November 3, 2026 general election, your voter registration must be received by October 19, 2026. Check your registration status online.

note: property tax: installment amount, due date, delinquency date; year-range text nearby

message.subject: Property tax installment
message.body_text: The first installment of your 2026-2027 property tax bill, $3,842.10, is due November 1, 2026 and becomes delinquent after December 10, 2026. A 10% penalty applies to late payments.

note: passport expiration far in the future with renew action

message.subject: Passport validity check
message.body_text: Our records show your passport expires on 03/14/2027. Many countries require six months of validity beyond your travel dates. Renew early to avoid processing delays.

note: in-category negative: optional public hearing date is informational

message.subject: Public hearing notice
message.body_text: A public hearing on the proposed zoning change for the Elm Street corridor will be held on July 9, 2026 at City Hall. Attendance is open to all residents. This notice is informational.

note: identity verification: deadline with sign/complete actions, verify outside lexicon

message.subject: Action needed: verify your identity
message.body_text: Action needed: verify your identity for your state benefits account. Sign in and complete identity verification by 06/29/2026 or your account access will be suspended.

note: business license renewal with abbreviated month and period

message.subject: Business license renewal
message.body_text: Reminder: your business license renewal payment of $128 is due Aug. 1, 2026. Renew by mail or in person at the city clerk's office.
